title: Workshop: Build an Adaptive Community Media Console
summary: Workshop: Build an Adaptive Community Media Console retrieves prior skills in an original content-driven media console with local and viewport adaptations scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply responsive mobile first, responsive content breakpoints, responsive media queries, responsive images, responsive embedded media, responsive container queries, responsive test matrix in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real content-driven media console with local and viewport adaptations artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
